---
title: "Measure-Theoretic Probability I"
subtitle: "Core Mathematics — Year 1"
date: "2025-01-01"
toc: true
toc-depth: 2
number-sections: true
---

# Measure-Theoretic Probability I

**Track**: Core Mathematics — Year 1

Rigorous probability theory built on measure theory. This is the mathematical foundation for all statistical inference, stochastic modeling, and uncertainty quantification in the curriculum.

## Table of Contents

1. Probability Spaces and σ-Algebras
2. Random Variables and Distribution Functions
3. Expectation via the Lebesgue Integral
4. Independence and Product Measures
5. Modes of Convergence
6. Laws of Large Numbers
7. Characteristic Functions and the Central Limit Theorem
8. Conditional Expectation
9. Generating Functions, Transforms, and Inequalities
10. Kolmogorov Extension and Infinite-Dimensional Probability

---

## Chapter 1: Probability Spaces and σ-Algebras

*This chapter has not yet been generated. Run the generation pipeline to produce full content.*

## Chapter 2: Random Variables and Distribution Functions

*This chapter has not yet been generated. Run the generation pipeline to produce full content.*

## Chapter 3: Expectation via the Lebesgue Integral

*This chapter has not yet been generated. Run the generation pipeline to produce full content.*

## Chapter 4: Independence and Product Measures

*This chapter has not yet been generated. Run the generation pipeline to produce full content.*

## Chapter 5: Modes of Convergence

*This chapter has not yet been generated. Run the generation pipeline to produce full content.*

## Chapter 6: Laws of Large Numbers

*This chapter has not yet been generated. Run the generation pipeline to produce full content.*

## Chapter 7: Characteristic Functions and the Central Limit Theorem

*This chapter has not yet been generated. Run the generation pipeline to produce full content.*

## Chapter 8: Conditional Expectation

*This chapter has not yet been generated. Run the generation pipeline to produce full content.*

## Chapter 9: Generating Functions, Transforms, and Inequalities

*This chapter has not yet been generated. Run the generation pipeline to produce full content.*

## Chapter 10: Kolmogorov Extension and Infinite-Dimensional Probability

*This chapter has not yet been generated. Run the generation pipeline to produce full content.*
